extract: Scizor (Japanese: ハッサム Hassam) is a dual-type Bug/Steel Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Scyther when traded while holding a Metal Coat. It is one of Scyther's final forms, the other being Kleavor. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.) Scizor can Mega Evolve into Mega Scizor using the Scizorite.
